scope: Sanitized first-pass identity intake for Audi MMI 3G High HNAV baseline HNAV-8T1035664F-K0257-D1.
privacyNotes: No VIN, plate, customer data, private path, access code, proprietary URL or binary package is included.

items.name: Controller identification assembled from project notes
items.notes: Part number and software identifiers are supported by recovered prior-chat screenshot readings, but the original screenshot files and original capture timestamp are not attached.

items.name: Full Auto-Scan before changes
items.notes: A prior uploaded Auto-Scan exists outside this branch, but a sanitized repository copy has not been reviewed or attached.

items.name: Red Engineering Menu identification
items.notes: Recovered prior-chat readings exist, but the original image files and exact menu path are not attached. No update, emergency or SWDL action is authorized.

items.name: Green Menu structure observation
items.notes: Recovered from prior user-supplied screenshot discussions. Visibility does not confirm function.

items.name: Green Menu diagnostic fault observations
items.notes: Recovered display strings are observations only and do not establish root cause.

items.name: Green Menu NADPhone version observation
items.notes: The recovered $ERROR$ display does not prove module presence, failure mode or telephone functionality.

items.name: DTC baseline before changes
items.notes: Prior Auto-Scan material contains DTC context, but a sanitized baseline file has not been reviewed or attached to this branch.

items.name: Original coding backup
items.notes: No coding value is included in this intake.

items.name: Read-only adaptation map
items.notes: No adaptation value is included in this intake.

items.name: Dataset and recovery backup
items.requiredBefore: Any dataset, parameterization or SWDL research
items.notes: Binary packages, access material and private recovery assets must not be published in this intake.

blockedClaims: Software train, variant, RadioUnit, MU version or sample is confirmed.
Sample d1 is proven to be equivalent to hwSample.
Green Menu visibility proves feature availability or functionality.
Green Menu diagnostic strings establish a confirmed root cause.
Coding or adaptation behavior is confirmed.
Security Access is known, valid or required for a specific operation.
Dataset, parameterization, emergency update or SWDL operations are safe.
HNAV to HN+ conversion feasibility or barrier location is established.
notes: This package records a real project unit context and recovered prior-chat screenshot observations, but remains PARTIAL until original images, sanitized diagnostic exports and timestamps are attached and reviewed.
